description.zh_CN: 确保每个 Fabric 版本都有 Fabric API 模组。在检测到 Fabric 版本缺失 Fabric API 时自动从 Modrinth 下载安装，同时可选安装 Mod Menu 和 Sodium 等常用前置模组。
description.en_US: Ensure every Fabric version has Fabric API installed. Auto-downloads Fabric API from Modrinth when missing, with optional install of common companion mods like Mod Menu and Sodium.
